steps.title: Cancel $y$ by adding
steps.content: The equations contain $3y$ and $-3y$, so add them: $$(3y)+(-3y)=(4x+17)+(9x-23).$$

steps.title: Solve only for $39x$
steps.content: This gives $0=13x-6$, so $13x=6$. The question asks for $39x$, which is $3$ times $13x$: $$39x=3(6)=18.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choice C is $13x$, choice B is $-13x$, and choice A is $-39x$.
